author: Haroen Viaene
subject: test(manager): use algoliasearch/lite (algolia/react-instantsearch#101)
body: I did a quick preg for all imports of algoliasearch', and this was the only one that is imported without the /lite. Even though this is mocked, and thus doesn't really have usages in the test, it's still best to use the same dependency everywhere.
